workflow_name: Customer Inquiry Thread -> Response + Pipeline Note
user_message: Can you extract the pipeline hygiene from this email thread for Fourth Coffee? The CSA flagged this as at-risk yesterday.

input_artifacts.content:
From: David Rivera <david.rivera@fourthcoffee.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-11 08:59 EST
Subject: Re: pipeline hygiene Discussion - Next Steps

Just checking in on the pipeline hygiene proposal. Our Infrastructure Manager is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: David Rivera <david.rivera@fourthcoffee.com>
Date: 2024-02-20 09:58 EST
Subject: Re: Re: pipeline hygiene Timeline

Just checking in on the pipeline hygiene proposal. Our Infrastructure Manager is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: David Rivera <david.rivera@fourthcoffee.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-25 10:46 EST
Subject: Follow-up: pipeline hygiene Review

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with pipeline hygiene. What are the next steps from your side?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Fourth Coffee: there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us

handoffs.condition: MSX update warranted from thread content

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Customer Inquiry Thread -> Response + Pipeline Note template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct pipeline hygiene decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
